summary: This is a brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky invites readers to upcoming informal dinner and lunch meetups in Bellevue, WA and Toronto. He asks attendees to RSVP for headcount purposes. The post highlights the community aspect of the Joel on Software blog, where readers could meet in person. There is no substantive technical or editorial content in this post.
key_points: Joel organized informal reader meetups in multiple cities as part of his blog community
The meetups were described as casual 'geek-out sessions' rather than formal events
The post reflects the strong community that formed around the Joel on Software blog in the mid-2000s
money_quotes: These are always very informal geek-out sessions, lots of fun and a chance to meet other readers in your area.
key_insight: This is a minor announcement post with no substantive content beyond scheduling reader meetups.
